steps.name: mobile-taxonomy-and-candidate-contract
steps.summary: Defined mobile-specific UI taxonomy, candidate batches, acceptance rules, search fixture additions, and phone-frame visual direction in docs/ui-vocabulary/mobile-expansion.md. Added horizon plan in docs/plans/2026-06-26-ui-vocabulary-mobile-expansion.md.

steps.name: mobile-app-shell-and-navigation
steps.summary: Add app shell/navigation terms and phone-frame visuals.

steps.name: mobile-overlays-and-system-feedback
steps.summary: Add bottom sheets, action/share sheets, permission prompts, alerts, and mobile feedback terms.

steps.name: mobile-gestures-and-touch-affordances
steps.summary: Add swipe, pull, long press, drag, page control, scrim, and touch feedback terms.

steps.name: mobile-inputs-pickers-and-auth
steps.summary: Add OTP, passcode, biometric, mobile picker, mobile search, address/contact, and voice input terms.

steps.name: mobile-content-commerce-and-audit
steps.summary: Add feed, story, media, commerce, map, and onboarding terms, then run duplicate/category/search fixture audit.
